infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: CoachOS uses the camera to log meals from photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: CoachOS uses your photos to log meals.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: CoachOS uses your location for weather-aware workout adjustments.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow CoachOS to use the camera to scan meals for calorie logging.
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow CoachOS to use the microphone when recording video.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow CoachOS to access photos for meal logging.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow CoachOS to use the camera for meal logging.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow CoachOS to use your location for weather-aware adjustments.
